fact: All customer data at rest is encrypted with AES-256; keys are managed by a dedicated KMS with automatic annual rotation.
All external traffic uses TLS 1.2 or higher; internal service-to-service traffic uses mTLS.
Production access requires SSO plus hardware-key MFA; access is reviewed quarterly and revoked automatically after 90 days of inactivity.
We maintain a documented incident response plan tested via tabletop exercise twice a year; customers are notified within 72 hours of a confirmed breach affecting their data.
A current subprocessor list is published and customers are notified 30 days before any new subprocessor is added.
Backups are taken daily, encrypted, retained for 35 days, and restore is tested quarterly.
